_comment: Claude Code hooks settings fragment. Copy to .claude/settings.json, or merge the top-level hooks object into an existing settings file. See templates/hooks/README.md for rollout and effectiveness notes. Schema: each hook matcher has a nested 'hooks' array of {type,command} objects — verified against Claude Code CLI v2.1+.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Optional workflow-state hint for long workflows. The script exits silently unless .skill-workflow-state exists.

PreToolUse._comment: Optional gate on rules/agent-behavior.md edits. Remove this matcher block to disable.
